description: Winning sequences for ls20 levels 1-2. Source: companion_arcprize.md @LAT-140LON10.

levels.description: Manual — cluster row position varies per game instance; no reliable fixed sequence.
levels.note: Play interactively via --server mode. Locate cluster in first frame (cols 20-22, rows vary). Optimal route once cluster found: trail-overlap collection then UP through shaft to entity2. See companion_arcprize.md @LAT20LON-30 for mechanic details.

levels.description: 17-step route: RIGHT, UP×6, LEFT×4, DOWN×6. Session 10 analysis — fully deterministic.
levels.note: Preconditions: block at rows 40-41 cols 29-33, entity1 state 0, timer 42 cols. Uses 17 of 21 available steps. No cross or 11-ring needed. Route identified session 10 but not yet executed end-to-end — treat as high-confidence hypothesis.

verify_start.note: After first action (RIGHT), block should be at rows 40-41 cols 34-38.
